Shadow TX Empty Trigger

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0xa0
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Shadow of FCR[5:4] (TET) allowing TX FIFO empty threshold change without rewriting FCR. Only present when FIFO_MODE, THRE_MODE_USER, and SHADOW are configured.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:2] reserved rw 0x0 -
[1:0] stet rw 0x0 STET

Field Descriptions

stet - STET

Shadow TX Empty Trigger. TX FIFO empty threshold for THRE interrupt. 00=FIFO empty, 01=2 chars in FIFO, 10=FIFO 1/4 full, 11=FIFO 1/2 full.
